name: TagCloud
classdesc:
JET Tag Cloud

Tag clouds are used to display text data with the importance of each tag shown with font size or color.


<oj-c-tag-cloud
  data="[[dataProvider]]">
</oj-c-tag-cloud>

When using font colors as a data dimension for tag clouds, the application needs to ensure that they meet minimum contrast requirements. Not all colors in the default value ramp provided by oj.ColorAttributeGroupHandler will meet minimum contrast requirements.

Keyboard End User Information

Key Action
Tab Move focus to next element.
Shift + Tab Move focus to previous element.
UpArrow Move focus and selection to previous data item.
DownArrow Move focus and selection to next data item.
LeftArrow Move focus and selection to previous data item.
RightArrow Move focus and selection to next data item.
Shift + UpArrow Move focus and multi-select previous data item.
Shift + DownArrow Move focus and multi-select next data item.
Shift + LeftArrow Move focus and multi-select previous data item.
Shift + RightArrow Move focus and multi-select next data item.
Ctrl + UpArrow Move focus to previous data item, without changing the current selection.
Ctrl + DownArrow Move focus to next data item, without changing the current selection.
Ctrl + LeftArrow Move focus to previous data item, without changing the current selection.
Ctrl + RightArrow Move focus to next data item, without changing the current selection.
Ctrl + Spacebar Multi-select data item with focus.
Enter Open a link when the url for a data item is set.
Shift+F10 Launch the context menu if there is one associated with the current item.

Accessibility

To make your component accessible, the application is required to include contextual information for screen readers using either:
  • aria-labelledby
  • aria-label
It is also recommended to include appropriate short-desc property values for your items to enhance accessibility.

If your application has custom keyboard and touch shortcuts implemented for the component, these shortcuts can conflict with those of the component. It is the application's responsibility to disclose these custom shortcuts, possibly via a datatip or help popup.

When using colors as a data dimension for tag clouds, the application needs to ensure that they meet minimum contrast requirements.

Performance

Shaped Data

As a rule of thumb, it's recommended that applications use shaped data if possible for performance gains.

Layout

Rectangular layouts are faster than cloud layouts and are recommended for larger data sets.

Touch End User Information

Target Gesture Action
Data Item Tap Select when selectionMode is enabled.
Open a link when the url for a data item is set.
Press & Hold Display context menu on release.
Background Press & Hold Display context menu on release.

ojsignature.value: interface CTagCloudElement<K extends string | number,D extends oj-c.TagCloud.Item<K> | any> extends JetElement<TagCloudElementSettableProperties<K,D>>

name: data
ojshortdesc: Specifies the DataProvider for the sections and items of the tag-cloud
description: Specifies the DataProvider for the sections and items of the tag-cloud.

name: datatip
description: The tagcloud datatip string.

name: hiddenCategories
ojshortdesc: An array of categories that will be hidden.
description: An array of category strings used for highlighting. Data items matching categories in this array will be highlighted.

name: touchResponse
ojshortdesc: Data visualizations require a press and hold delay before triggering datatips and rollover effects on mobile devices to avoid interfering with page panning, but these hold delays can make applications seem slower and less responsive. For a better user experience, the application can remove the touch and hold delay when data visualizations are used within a non scrolling container or if there is sufficient space outside of the visualization for panning. If touchResponse is touchStart the element will instantly trigger the touch gesture and consume the page pan events. If touchResponse is auto, the element will behave like touchStart if it determines that it is not rendered within scrolling content and if element panning is not available for those elements that support the feature.
description: Data visualizations require a press and hold delay before triggering datatips and rollover effects on mobile devices to avoid interfering with page panning, but these hold delays can make applications seem slower and less responsive. For a better user experience, the application can remove the touch and hold \delay when data visualizations are used within a non scrolling container or if there is sufficient space outside of the visualization for panning. If touchResponse is touchStart the element will instantly trigger the touch gesture and consume the page pan events. If touchResponse is auto, the element will behave like touchStart if it determines that it is not rendered within scrolling content and if element panning is not available for those elements that support the feature.

name: highlightMatch
description: The matching condition for the highlightedCategories option. By default, highlightMatch is 'all' and only items whose categories match all of the values specified in the highlightedCategories array will be highlighted. If highlightMatch is 'any', then items that match at least one of the highlightedCategories values will be highlighted.

name: highlightedCategories
description: An array of categories that will be highlighted.

name: hoverBehavior
ojshortdesc: Defines the behavior applied when hovering over data items.
description: Defines the behavior applied when hovering over a tagcloud item.

ojvalues.name: none
ojvalues.description: No hover behavior will be applied.

name: layout
description: The layout to use for tag display.

ojvalues.name: cloud
ojvalues.description: Items will be horizontally placed in available space.

name: selectionMode
description: The type of selection behavior that is enabled on the tag cloud. This attribute controls the number of selections that can be made via selection gestures at any given time.

name: selection
description: An array containing the ids of the initially selected data items.

name: contextMenuConfig
datatipConfig
description: The DatatipConfig object is used to allow applications to control the appearance and behavior of the datatip.

name: setProperty
ojshortdesc: Sets a property or a single subproperty for complex properties and notifies the component of the change, triggering a corresponding event.
description: Sets a property or a single subproperty for complex properties and notifies the component of the change, triggering a corresponding event.

params.name: property
params.description: The property name to set. Supports dot notation for subproperty access.

params.name: value
params.description: The new value to set the property to.

name: getProperty
ojshortdesc: Retrieves the value of a property or a subproperty.
description: Retrieves the value of a property or a subproperty.

params.name: property
params.description: The property name to get. Supports dot notation for subproperty access.

name: setProperties
ojshortdesc: Performs a batch set of properties.
description: Performs a batch set of properties.

params.name: properties
params.description: An object containing the property and value pairs to set.

name: ojContextMenuAction
ojshortdesc: Triggered when a menu item is clicked, whether by keyboard, mouse, or touch events.
description: Triggered when a menu item is clicked, whether by keyboard, mouse, or touch events.

tstype.value: { type: 'background'; }|{ data?: oj-c.TagCloud.Item<K>; itemData?: D; type: 'item'; }

name: ojContextMenuSelection
ojshortdesc: Triggered when a select menu item is clicked, whether by keyboard, mouse, or touch events.
description: Triggered when a select menu item is clicked, whether by keyboard, mouse, or touch events.

tstype.value: { type: 'background'; }|{ data?: oj-c.TagCloud.Item<K>; itemData?: D; type: 'item'; }

name: itemTemplate
description:
Note: When the template is executed for each item, it will have access to the binding context containing the following properties: [oj-c.TagCloud.TagCloudItemTemplateContext]{@link oj-c.TagCloud.TagCloudItemTemplateContext}

The itemTemplate slot is used to specify the template for creating items. The slot content must be a single <template> element.

When the template is executed for each area, it will have access to the tag cloud's binding context and the following properties:

  • $current - an object that contains information for the current item. (See the table below for a list of properties available on $current)
  • alias - if data-oj-as attribute was specified, the value will be used to provide an application-named alias for $current.

The content of the template should only be one <oj-c-tag-cloud-item> element. See the oj-tag-cloud-item doc for more details.
ojshortdesc: The itemTemplate slot is used to map each data item in the component. See the Help documentation for more information.

name: datatipTemplate
description:
Note: When the template is executed for each item, it will have access to the binding context containing the following properties: [oj-c.TagCloud.DatatipTemplateContext]{@link oj-c.TagCloud.DatatipTemplateContext}

The datatipTemplate slot is used to specify custom datatip content.

properties.name: id
properties.description: The item id should be set by the application if the DataProvider is not being used. The row key will be used as id in the DataProvider case.

properties.name: categories
properties.description: An array of category strings corresponding to the tag cloud items. This allows highlighting and filtering of items.
properties.ojshortdesc: An array of category strings corresponding to the tag cloud items.

properties.name: color
properties.description: The color of the text. Will be overridden by any color defined in the style option. The default value comes from the CSS and varies based on theme.

properties.name: label
properties.description: The text of the item.

properties.name: value
properties.description: The value of this item is used to scale its font size within the tag cloud.

properties.name: url
properties.description: The url this item references.

properties.name: shortDesc
properties.description: The description of the item. This is used for customizing the datatip text.

name: DatatipContext
description: Context for datatip function.

properties.name: id
properties.description: The id of the currently active tag cloud item.

properties.name: data
properties.description: The data object of the current item.

properties.name: key
properties.description: The key of the current item.

properties.name: index
properties.description: The zero-based index of the current item.

name: DatatipStyle
description: The DatatipStyle is used to specify datatip border color.

properties.name: defaultContainer
properties.description: Defines if the datatip container is visually shown. For applications requiring full control over the datatip's appearance, the defaultContainer should be set to "disabled". In this mode, the content provided by the datatipTemplate slot takes up the whole datatip. This only applies if a datatipTemplate slot is used.

properties.name: style
properties.description: Defines the style of the datatip container.

properties.name: rendered
properties.description: Defines if the datatip is rendered.
